ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 5000m Run) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., track, field) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance or duration of the event */,
  "scoring" TEXT /* Scoring mechanism used for the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* The date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* The location where the event is held */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* The status of the event (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the athlete (e.g., FR-1, JR-3) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the athlete was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the athlete was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* The URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the coach was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the coach was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the trainer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the trainer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "time" REAL /* Time or score achieved by the athlete */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place achieved by the athlete */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* The date when the result was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* The date of participation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the participation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the participation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* The date of attendance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* The date when revenue was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* The amount of revenue generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of revenue (e.g., ticket sales, sponsorships) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the revenue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the revenue record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
